Container.Name: searxng
Container.Overview: Self-hosted privacy-respecting metasearch engine. Aggregates results from Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, etc., without any of them seeing your IP. JSON output is enabled in the seeded config so this works as a search backend for MCP servers (mcp-searxng), GPT-Researcher, or any LLM-side research workflow. [br]On first boot the template wgets a starter settings.yml with JSON output, generates a unique SEARXNG_SECRET, and persists it. Edits to settings.yml hot-reload after a container restart.
Container.PostArgs: -c "d=/etc/searxng; mkdir -p $d; [ ! -f $d/settings.yml ] && wget -qO $d/settings.yml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iknox/unraid-templates/main/config-examples/searxng.settings.yml && echo '[init] seeded settings.yml'; [ ! -f $d/.secret ] && head -c 32 /dev/urandom | base64 > $d/.secret && echo '[init] generated SEARXNG_SECRET'; export SEARXNG_SECRET=$(cat $d/.secret); exec /usr/local/searxng/container/entrypoint.sh"
Container.Description: SearXNG is the modern fork of Searx. Acts as a proxy that queries multiple search engines simultaneously and merges results, so you get Google-quality results without giving Google your queries. [br]Wired up here for use as an MCP backend on castle's local-ai network. mcp-searxng (running as stdio from your client machine) talks to this container's JSON API and exposes searxng_web_search + web_url_read to Claude Code or any other MCP-compatible LLM client.

Config.Name: HTTP / API
Config.Description: Web UI plus JSON API endpoint at /search?format=json. mcp-searxng will hit this URL.

Config.Name: Config dir
Config.Description: Holds settings.yml and the persisted .secret file. Edit settings.yml here to tune enabled engines, safe_search, language, etc.

Config.Name: BASE_URL
Config.Description: Public URL of this instance, only needed if you want correct shareable links from the web UI. Leave blank for LAN-only use.
